---
id: generate-mixtape-tracks
title: "Generate mixtape tracks"
description: "Uses the associated DJ profile's style to generate a tracklist for the mixtape. Returns an HTML fragment with the generated tracks."
sidebar_label: "Generate mixtape tracks"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//spotter-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Generate mixtape tracks"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/vibes/mixtapes/{id}/generate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Uses the associated DJ profile's style to generate a tracklist for the mixtape. Returns an HTML fragment with the generated tracks.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
